his financial circumstances will improve considerably and he will live

CHART 221
This native will be of an artistic
Sat. temperament. Venus is placed in sec
Jupt.
Dt. ond to Mercury and Saturn is conjunct
Ketu. There is Jupiter behind Saturn in
his own house Pisces. So the native
Mars
will be a preacher advocating libera
tion. He will also be an Ayurvedic
physician. Venus has Mars in the 3rd
house (none in second) who exchanges
Ven. Sun
Moop Mer. Dh. places with Saturn in Aries. This indi
cates the wife to be a surgeon.
The Sun conjunct Mercury indicates the father to be a trader of a high
order. As the Sun has Venus and the Moon in the 2nd to him, the father may
have two wives. He will have more daughters than sons as Mars and Saturn
have exchanged places and Saturn is conjunct Ketu. By propitiating the
family deity one son will be born.
The native will be married between 28-30 and will have favourable
